labels.name: codex-loop-ready
labels.description: Eligible for the governed human-supervised development loop
labels.purpose: Marks an issue as eligible for bounded implementation selection.
labels.application_rule: Andrew may apply it only after reviewing the complete issue and confirming every eligibility rule.
labels.removal_rule: Andrew removes it when scope, evidence, risk, dependencies, decisions, or governance no longer satisfy eligibility.

labels.name: risk-low
labels.description: Bounded, reversible work with strong independent validation
labels.purpose: Records low implementation and verification risk.
labels.application_rule: Apply after confirming bounded impact, safe reversibility, and strong independent validation.
labels.removal_rule: Remove when the risk classification changes or the issue closes.

labels.name: risk-medium
labels.description: Broader impact or verification needs; supervised execution allowed
labels.purpose: Records medium risk that remains suitable for supervised execution.
labels.application_rule: Apply when impact or evidence needs are broader but the issue remains independently testable and reversible.
labels.removal_rule: Remove when the risk classification changes or the issue closes.

labels.name: risk-high
labels.description: Material governed-boundary risk; no automatic selection
labels.purpose: Routes material product, data, security, privacy, schema, ingestion, deployment, or operational risk to humans.
labels.application_rule: Apply when any material governed-boundary or operational risk requires human-controlled handling.
labels.removal_rule: Remove only after Andrew approves a documented reclassification or the issue closes.

labels.name: requires-product-decision
labels.description: Unresolved product or UX authority is required before execution
labels.purpose: Makes an unresolved product or UX decision visible.
labels.application_rule: Apply as soon as implementation depends on an unresolved product or UX decision.
labels.removal_rule: Remove after the authorized human decision is recorded in the issue.

labels.name: requires-data-decision
labels.description: Unresolved data, mapping, provenance, or contract decision
labels.purpose: Makes an unresolved data-governance decision visible.
labels.application_rule: Apply when data semantics, mapping, correction, provenance, or contract authority is unresolved.
labels.removal_rule: Remove after the authorized data decision and its evidence are recorded.

labels.name: requires-security-review
labels.description: Security or privacy review is required before implementation or merge
labels.purpose: Routes unresolved security or privacy review to human authority.
labels.application_rule: Apply when security or privacy review remains required before implementation or merge.
labels.removal_rule: Remove after the authorized review is recorded and any resulting blockers are resolved.

labels.name: requires-manual-ui-review
labels.description: Human visual or interaction review is required before completion
labels.purpose: Records a mandatory human UI evidence gate without necessarily blocking implementation.
labels.application_rule: Apply when automated implementation may proceed but visual or interaction review is required before merge or completion.
labels.removal_rule: Remove after the required human UI review and disposition are recorded.

labels.name: blocked
labels.description: Execution cannot proceed while a dependency or decision remains
labels.purpose: Stops execution while a dependency, decision, evidence gap, or governed boundary is unresolved.
labels.application_rule: Apply immediately when safe implementation cannot proceed.
labels.removal_rule: Remove only after the blocker and its resolution are recorded.
